backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Change Tournament class to extend the new Aggregate base class instead of implementing the old interface.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The old Aggregate interface is removed or incompatible; the new architecture requires extending a base class to inherit versioning, state, and merge logic.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Remove manual JPA ID and Aggregate ID fields, delegating identity management to the new Aggregate base class.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate base class manages ID and aggregateId; keeping them causes duplicate field errors or conflicts with the base class implementation.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.before: @Id @GeneratedValue private Integer id; @Column(name = "aggregate_id") private Integer aggregateId;

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Remove manual version and creation timestamp fields, delegating to the new Aggregate base class.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate base class manages version and timestamps; keeping them causes duplicate field errors.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.before: @Column(name = "version") private Integer version; @Column(name = "creation_ts") private LocalDateTime creationTs;

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Remove manual state field, delegating to the new Aggregate base class.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate base class manages state; keeping it causes duplicate field errors.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Update imports to use the new causal consistency package structure.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The old package paths (e.g., blcm.aggregate.domain) are removed or renamed; code fails to compile without updated imports.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Update constructor to call super() with new Aggregate signature and remove manual field initialization.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate constructor requires specific arguments (aggregateId, type); failing to call it or passing wrong args causes compile/runtime errors.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Update copy constructor to call super(other) and initialize final fields.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate base class requires proper initialization via super(other); failing to do so breaks inheritance chain.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Replace static merge method with instance method mergeFields conforming to new Aggregate interface.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate interface defines mergeFields; the old static merge method is no longer part of the contract, causing compile errors if the interface is implemented.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.before: public static Tournament merge(Tournament prev, Tournament v1, Tournament v2)
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.after: public Aggregate mergeFields(Set<String> toCommitVersionChangedFields, Aggregate committedVersion, Set<String> committedVersionChangedFields)

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Implement getEventSubscriptions to return causal consistency event subscriptions.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate interface requires getEventSubscriptions; missing implementation causes compile error.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Implement remove() method to enforce deletion invariants before calling super.remove().
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate interface requires remove(); missing implementation causes compile error.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Change verifyInvariants to void and throw exception on failure, conforming to new Aggregate contract.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate interface defines verifyInvariants as void; returning boolean causes compile error.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Implement getFieldsChangedByFunctionalities and getIntentions for new merge logic.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate interface requires these methods; missing implementation causes compile error.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.after: public Set<String> getFieldsChangedByFunctionalities() ... public Set<String[]> getIntentions() ...

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Update setVersion to handle quiz version synchronization before calling super.setVersion.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: The new Aggregate base class manages version; overriding is required for specific business logic, but must call super.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.before: public void setVersion(Integer version) { this.version = version; }

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Remove getters/setters for fields now managed by Aggregate base class (id, aggregateId, version, creationTs, state).
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.why_exists: These fields are removed from the class; keeping getters/setters causes compile errors.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.before: public Integer getId() { return id; } ... public void setState(AggregateState state) { ... }
